component.name: ClipVault
component.summary: Windows-style clipboard history manager for Linux

description.p: ClipVault brings the Windows clipboard history experience to Linux. Press Win+V anywhere to open a searchable popup of everything you have copied — text, links, code snippets, and images — then click or press Enter to paste instantly.

ul.li: Win+V hotkey opens clipboard history from anywhere
Stores up to 200 recent copies persistently across reboots
Captures text, links, code snippets and images automatically
Full-text search to filter history instantly
Keyboard navigation with arrow keys, Enter to paste, Del to remove
Works on both Wayland and X11
Starts silently at login with zero configuration

description.p: Initial release with full Wayland and X11 support.
